content.rendered:
It’s that time of year once again – COMPUTEX Taipei is almost upon us!

The 2018 edition of COMPUTEX will take place from June 5 to June 9 at the Taipei World Trade Center Nangang Exhibition Hall, where AMI will be hosting a booth once again.

This year, we will be located in Booth L1332, on the Fourth Floor of Hall 1.

As always, AMI will showcase the latest advancements in Aptio® V UEFI Firmware for x86 and Arm®-based platforms, MegaRAC® BMC and Remote Management, innovative IoT solutions like IoTbrix™ Firmware Development Environment and more – with live demos and AMI experts on hand throughout the event.

For those planning to attend COMPUTEX Taipei 2018, we offer you a warm welcome and look forward to seeing you there!
